_provenance: PA-18: Schema-derived with runtime validator. Column set and constraints authored from feature-plans/decision-science/phase-1/018-researcher-dof-ledger/plan.md §Deliverables, cross-checked against docs/handoff/decision-science-council-synthesis.md §2.2 (additive N_effective = N_optuna + S), §2.5 (NN1 spec-freeze / evidence_source enum), and docs/handoff/decision-science-v3-and-divergence-evaluation.md §A.0 Defect 2 (sub-sweep sum binding). No producer-computed values are captured; all assertions are shape/presence/constraint checks.
description: Expected schema shape for researcher_dof_ledger table after migration 018_researcher_dof_ledger.sql is applied. Used by the fixture-refresh schema-validator test and the Phase-1 seed-row presence test.

evidence_source_notes._note: S = SUM(n_configs_searched) WHERE evidence_source = 'BACKTEST_SELECTION'. Sources not in s_accumulator_sources do NOT contribute to S, so N_effective = N_optuna + 0 = N_optuna in the honest Phase-1 case (council §2.2 property 1).

phase1_seed_rows._note: Three theory-frozen seed rows from council §3.3 / plan §Deliverables #3. Tests assert their presence after run_migrations(). Tests do NOT assert exact column values — only that the row exists and that evidence_source is NOT 'BACKTEST_SELECTION' (so S remains 0).

rows._note: CRRA risk-aversion parameter. Frozen by theory. n_configs_searched=1 is the default; no P&L-toured search was conducted.
CRRA utility family. Frozen by theory or mandate. The plan notes THEORY or MANDATE — either is acceptable for Phase-1.
Wealth argument (W-H2 derivation). Frozen by calibration — the W-H2 derivation result (docs/handoff/w-h2-wealth-argument-derivation.md).

phase1_seed_rows.invariant_s_equals_zero: All three rows have evidence_source != 'BACKTEST_SELECTION', so count_dof_backtest_selections() must return 0 after seeding only these rows. This is the council §2.2 property-1 byte-identity assertion.

sub_sweep_accounting._note: Defect 2 binding: a single P&L-toured spec with n_configs_searched=K contributes K to S, not 1. The accumulator is SUM(n_configs_searched), not COUNT(DISTINCT spec_bundle_id). See docs/handoff/decision-science-v3-and-divergence-evaluation.md §A.0 Defect 2.

example._note: SUM=6 is the binding conservative upper bound. COUNT(DISTINCT)=2 would undercount when any bundle has n_configs_searched > 1.
